title: K'NEX | Typhoon Frenzy Roller Coaster Age 9+ | 2-in-1 Model Construction Set for Boys and Girls, 19 Foot Toy, 640 Piece Kids Building Set for Children Ages 9+ | Basic Fun 51438, Red
features: BUILD A 19FT LONG ROLLERCOASTER: With over 640 pieces including rods, connectors, 19 ft of track, motorised power and a silver coaster car, this awesome building set lets you create a cyclone of twisting roller coaster fun in your living room

EASY TO BUILD 2-IN-1 MODEL: Discover non-stop action with this toy building set and download the exclusive instructions to build an incredible second model, the Tsunami Surge Coaster. With 2 models to build, kids and adults alike will enjoy hours of fun

EDUCATIONAL TOY: This construction set helps strengthen fine motor skills, logical thinking and problem solving. Perfect for capturing kids’ interest in basic construction, science and design, while promoting concentration and logical thinking
TOYS FOR 9 YEAR OLDS +: Ideal for encouraging young children to build and create while developing an understanding of STEM subjects, these kids building sets are great for children aged 9 and up

IDEAL GIFT FOR CHILDREN AND ADULTS: A great birthday gift or Christmas present for everybody. This amusement park set is a great gift for children looking for new challenges. This 19 foot long roller coaster building set for kids opens the door for hours of creative design play
description: From the manufacturer A Splash of Creativity! Bring a wave of fun from the ocean to your living room with the new Typhoon Frenzy Roller Coaster Building Set! Build with over 640 K''NEX parts & pieces like rods, connectors and track, and add motorized power to send the silver coaster car twisting and turning through over 19 feet of swirling, non-stop action! Silver Coaster Car Over 19 feet of coaster tracks Motorized Chain Lift Create Your Own Amusement Park! The K’NEX Thrill Rides line allows children to build an entire theme park in their room – heart-pounding roller coasters, majestic Ferris Wheels, and more come to life before their eyes. K’NEX is building worlds kids love, and we invite you to come along for the ride!

specifications_table.Educational Objective(s): ‎Logical Thinking, Creative Thinking, Motor Skills, STEM, Problem Solving Skills
